name: social-neuron-com-mcp
description: Connect Codex to Social Neuron for governed social-content planning, creation, scheduling, and analytics.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, create, schedule, and analyze social content.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Social Neuron through its OAuth-protected remote MCP server. Turn briefs into reviewable plans, create content, schedule approved work, inspect analytics, manage comments, and monitor usage.
defaultPrompt: Turn this campaign brief into a reviewable content plan.
Show my best-performing content this week.
Draft next week's social calendar for approval.
